faq.title: [EN] Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: [EN] How do I book this safari?
faq.a1: [EN] You can book directly through our website by clicking Book Now or Inquire, or contact us via WhatsApp or email.
faq.a2: [EN] Absolutely! Every safari we offer can be tailored to your preferences, budget, and travel dates.
faq.q3: [EN] What should I pack for this safari?
faq.a3: [EN] We recommend neutral-colored clothing, comfortable walking shoes, sun protection, binoculars, and a camera.
faq.a4: [EN] We strongly recommend comprehensive travel insurance that covers trip cancellation, medical emergencies, and evacuation.

safaris.sectionSubheading: Handgemachte Reisen durch Afrikas atemberaubendste Landschaften

parks.title: Nationalparks
parks.subtitle: Entdecken Sie Afrikas Naturwunder

faq.title: [EN] Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: [EN] When is the best time to visit this park?
faq.a1: [EN] The best time varies by park, but generally the dry season (June to October) offers the best wildlife viewing.
faq.q2: [EN] What wildlife can I expect to see?
faq.a2: [EN] Each park has its unique wildlife. Our expert guides will help you spot the area's most iconic species.
faq.q3: [EN] Are there entry fees for the park?
faq.a3: [EN] Yes, all national parks and reserves have entry fees. These are typically included in our safari packages.
faq.q4: [EN] How do I get to this park?
faq.a4: [EN] Most parks are accessible by road from Arusha or nearby towns. We provide comfortable 4x4 vehicles.

parks.sectionSubheading: Von den Serengeti-Ebenen bis zum Ngorongoro-Krater und darüber hinaus
